use_cases: Trigger actions or navigate users to specific pages
Submit forms with styled CTA buttons
Provide destructive action buttons with warning styling
Create ghost or outline buttons for secondary actions
Use as link-style buttons for inline navigation
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with React and Radix UI Slot for composition. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Uses CVA for variant management and includes standard accessibility features like focus-visible ring and disabled states. Commonly used within larger components like Hero sections for CTAs.
